title: dbaues' Animated Lanterns
body:
![All Lanterns animated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b92ff7018dec49aeb4b09754ca6519ca750cc012.gif)

A redesign of vanilla lanterns to add better animations. Created to maintain the look and feel of vanilla textures while also adding more life in the form of cleaner animations.

Adds textures for all the lanterns as of 1.21.9.
